title: Happy's Better Emojis
description: This resourcepacks revamps Minecraft's emojis because of their bad vanilla design.
body:
This Resourcepack's objective is to revamp all the emojis from Minecraft because of their bad design that some people found out (including myself).

The resourcepack will have all emojis, even unsupported ones, which will be found in the Unicode Private-Use Area (U+EC00 -> ...)
